use_cases: Displaying grouped content with structured header, body, and footer sections
Building dashboard panels with title, description, and action buttons
Creating product or feature cards with consistent spacing and borders
Composing layout grids with uniform card components
Displaying data entries with semantic card structure in lists
ai_summary: A compound card component system from 21st.dev with sub-components for card header, title, description, action, content, and footer. Built on Tailwind CSS with semantic data-slot attributes and responsive container queries. Follows standard card UI patterns for SaaS dashboards and content display, offering a clean, minimal visual style with subtle border separators.
